meaning: n.<印地> 个人尊严,自尊心,荣誉,威望
examples: The izzat of the household was at stake.
Tuesday's crash prompted Gov. Izzat Saad of Luxor province to ban all hot air balloon flights until further notice.
Only his deputy, Izzat al-Douri, escaped capture and punishment in a war-crimes trial.
The Iraqi delegation, led by Izzat Ibrahim, the vice-chairman of the Revolutionary Command Council, had other reasons to feel discomfited.
